dict.string: Nudge uses the microphone so you can brain dump your thoughts by speaking instead of typing.
Nudge uses on-device speech recognition to turn your spoken words into task cards.
Nudge can look up contacts so you can quickly call or message someone from a task card.
Nudge shows your calendar events alongside tasks in the timeline view so you can see your full day at a glance.
Nudge can import your existing reminders so you can manage everything in one place.
Nudge can surface tasks when you’re near their location — like reminding you to pick up groceries when you’re at the store.
Nudge reads your step count to suggest task energy levels — low-energy tasks when you’ve been active, high-energy when you’re fresh.
Nudge records your focus timer sessions as Mindful Minutes in Apple Health so you can track your productivity.
